name: Evergreen
description: React UI framework for building enterprise-grade web applications by Segment

description.value: React UI framework for building enterprise-grade web applications by Segment

active-maintenance.comment: Inactive project. No new releases in over 18 months (last release June 2023). Twilio acquired Segment and transitioned to Twilio Paste.

initial-release.comment: Copyright 2017 Segment.io, Inc. Repository created approximately 8 years ago.

latest-release.comment: v7.1.9 released June 21, 2023. Project is no longer actively maintained as Twilio (which acquired Segment) has transitioned to Twilio Paste.

styling-approach.comment: Built on ui-box, Evergreen's custom CSS-in-JS solution. v7 removed glamor CSS library in favor of internal styling.

component-model.comment: Styled components with ready-to-use visuals. Ships with polished React components that work out of the box.

typescript.comment: Includes TypeScript configuration and type definitions (index.d.ts). Repository is 88% JavaScript, 12% TypeScript.

ssr-compatible.comment: Supports SSR with extractStyles() function. Documentation includes Next.js and Gatsby integration examples.

rsc-compatible.comment: No documented React Server Components support. Last release predates widespread RSC adoption.

design-system.comment: Custom enterprise-grade design language developed by Segment. Not based on Material Design or other existing systems.

dark-mode.comment: No built-in dark mode support. Users can create custom dark themes via the theming architecture but it's not provided out of the box.

theming-system.comment: Extensible theming architecture with baseStyle, appearances, and sizes. Inspired by Chakra UI's useStyleConfig API. Supports mergeTheme utility for deep merging theme objects.

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS-in-JS via ui-box rather than CSS custom properties for theming.

design-tokens.comment: Theme object includes tokens for colors, fills, intents, radii, shadows, fontFamilies, fontSizes, fontWeights, letterSpacings, lineHeights, and zIndices.

rtl-support.comment: RTL support not documented in available resources.

component-count.comment: 37 reusable components including Alert, Autocomplete, Avatar, Badge, Button, Checkbox, Combobox, Dialog, File Uploader, Menu, Popover, Select, Side Sheet, Spinner, Switch, Table, Tabs, Tag Input, Text Input, Textarea, Toaster, Tooltip, and more.

text-input.comment: Text Input component for standard text entry

textarea.comment: Textarea component for multi-line text input

select.comment: Select and Select Menu components for single selection

multi-select.comment: Select Menu component supports multiple selection

combobox.comment: Combobox and Autocomplete components for searchable selection

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for boolean toggle values

slider.comment: No Slider component in the component list

number-input.comment: No dedicated Number Input component. Text Input can be used with type='number'.

tag-input.comment: Tag Input component for multiple tags/tokens with add/remove

date-picker.comment: No Date Picker component in the component list

file-upload.comment: File Uploader and Filepicker components for file selection

dropzone.comment: File Uploader component supports drag-and-drop functionality

input-groups.comment: Group component for combining inputs with addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown component, but can be composed using Group

table.comment: Table component with Table Layout pattern

data-table.comment: Basic Table component exists but no advanced DataTable with built-in sorting/filtering/pagination

card.comment: Card component via the theming system (Pane with Card variant)

badge.comment: Badge & Pill components for status indicators

tag-chip-pill.comment: Badge & Pill components serve as tag/chip functionality

toast-notification.comment: Toaster component for temporary popup notifications

empty-state.comment: Empty States pattern documented for empty content areas

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog and Corner Dialog components for modal overlays

drawer-sheet.comment: Side Sheet component for slide-in panels

vertical-tabs.comment: No explicit vertical tabs support documented

navigation-menu.comment: No dedicated navigation menu component. Menu component is for action menus.

sidebar.comment: SidebarTab was removed in v7.0.0. No dedicated sidebar navigation component.

grid.comment: No dedicated Grid component. Layout handled via Pane with flexbox.

stack.comment: No Stack component. Layout built via Pane with ui-box flexbox utilities.

container.comment: No Container component. Pane can be used as a container.

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in or official chart integrations

form-libraries.comment: Form Field component exists but no official form library bindings documented

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in animations via keyframes for transitions, rotations, and slides

icon-libraries.comment: Built-in icon system. Segment icons included.

date-libraries.comment: No date picker or date library integrations

aria-compliant.comment: Components include ARIA attributes for accessibility

screen-reader-tested.comment: Screen reader testing not explicitly documented

focus-management.comment: Dialog and overlay components include focus management via Overlay and Portal components

wcag-level.comment: WCAG compliance level not explicitly documented

accessibility-rating.comment: Adequate accessibility with ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation, but no explicit WCAG compliance claims or screen reader testing documentation.

bundle-size-full.comment: 319 kB minified + gzipped. 1.11 MB minified only. Has 17 dependencies.

bundle-size-core.comment: No distinct core bundle. Tree-shaking available for individual components.

zero-runtime.comment: Uses CSS-in-JS via ui-box which requires runtime

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy-loaded via React.lazy

documentation-quality.comment: Adequate documentation with component examples and API reference. Some sections lack detail (theming, accessibility). Documentation has not been updated since 2023.

figma-kit.comment: Figma library available but deprecated (v6). Users directed to Twilio Paste Components instead.

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 12,798 weekly downloads as of December 2025. Monthly downloads range 35k-67k.

commercial-support.comment: No commercial support available. Project is open source under MIT license.

style-override.comment: Built on ui-box which provides style props for all CSS properties. className also supported.

compound-components.comment: Components are primarily standalone. Limited compound component patterns.

render-props.comment: Limited render prop patterns. Components are primarily declarative.

slots.comment: No slots pattern. React children used for content injection.

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled mode. Components come with built-in styling.
